text:
Disney+ has confirmed the future of a top-rated show on the platform dubbed "imperfect but beautiful" by audiences.

The thrilling finale ofPercy Jackson and the Olympians Season 2landed onDisney+today (January 21), with fans desperately seeking news about the forthcoming season.

The popular series follows demigod Percy Jackson (Walker Scobell) as he battles monsters and deitiesalongside his companionsAnnabeth (Leah Sava Jeffries) and Grover (Aryan Simhadri).

The two seasons released thus far have secured an outstanding 95 per cent critics' rating on Rotten Tomatoes, whilst audiences granted it 83 per cent.

Supporters weren't kept waiting for Season 3 updates for too long however. As the credits began following Season 2's suspenseful finale, audiences discovered they were quickly interrupted by footage depicting Annabeth guiding Percy onto a dance floor. The duo then enjoy a tender first dance whilst Stephen Sanchez's popular track Until I Found You accompanies the moment.



Read more:Percy Jackson and the Olympians episode release explained

Read more:Everything Percy Jackson season 2's Tyson star has been in before

The sequence was actually a preview of Season 3 and concluded with confirmation that the fresh instalment will debut later this year before the credits subsequently continued. According to Disney+, the third season is currently being filmed in Vancouver, reportsthe Mirror.

It will draw from the third book in Rick Riordan's series, titled The Titan's Curse. According to the novel's official synopsis: "When Percy Jackson gets an urgent distress call from his friend Grover, he immediately prepares for battle. He knows he will need his powerful demigod allies at his side, his trusty bronze sword Riptide, and... a ride from his mom.

"The demigods rush to the rescue to find that Grover has made an important discovery: two powerful half-bloods whose parentage is unknown. But that's not all that awaits them. The titan lord Kronos has devised his most treacherous plot yet, and the young heroes have just fallen prey."

A post shared by Percy Jackson (@percyseries)

The Season 3 sneak peek was simultaneously posted to the official Percy Jackson social media accounts this evening and thousands of enthusiasts have already swamped the comments section.

"Giving S3 to us THIS YEAR is such a gift," one delighted supporter declared. Another wrote: "This helps the sting of season 2 ending already."

A third viewer exclaimed: "THIS IS LEGENDARY, THIS IS ICONIC, THIS WILL CHANGE LIVES!" whilst a fourth jested: "I definitely think the people in my very thin walled apartment building were concerned for my well-being when this scene came on.

We use your sign-up to provide content in ways you've consented to and to improve our understanding of you. This may include adverts from us and 3rd parties based on our understanding. You can unsubscribe at any time. Read ourPrivacy Policy

"THE EYE CONTACT, THE CHEMISTRY, HELLO," another remarked. Meanwhile one enthusiast stunned by the release date announcement commented: "The way I screamed, 'This Year?!' when I saw it!"

Percy Jackson and the Olympians Season 1 and Season 2 are available to stream on Disney+.For the latest showbiz, TV, movie and streaming news, go to the new **Everything Gossip** website.

title: Disney+ confirms fate of ‘imperfect but beautiful’ 95% rated series | TV & Radio | Showbiz & TV | Express.co.uk
author: Samantha King
description: The streaming giant dropped a surprise announcement tonight (January 21) about one of its much-loved shows.
